evidence.description: The task description clearly outlines the required retrieval surfaces (CLI, MCP) and the data points to be exposed.
The project structure follows a clear modular architecture (protocol, core, store, cli), which simplifies locating relevant code and defining the implementation path.
Existing CLI commands and MCP tools provide a clear pattern for adding the new functionality.
